questions.axisBrief: Explain my focused axis score and tier using vehicle metaphors.
questions.weakestLink: Identify my weakest six-axis link and one concrete training directive.
questions.momentum: Compare momentum deltas — intake gain or carbon buildup?
questions.weightSim: Using weightSimulation, project strength P2W at the target weight.

gate.authDescription: Sign in with Google to power on DYNO INTEL.
gate.coreDescription: Own Core for 2 daily single-axis AI briefings.
gate.proDescription: Cross-axis diagnostics and weight simulation are Pro — join the arena.
gate.quotaDescription: Daily uplink exhausted. Try again tomorrow or upgrade to Pro for 30/day.

body.pro-required: ⚠️ [CONSOLE INTEGRITY ERROR]: The ECU has tripped remaining cross-axis diagnostics. Driver {{axis}} axis is idling at {{score}} pts with a leak — chassis balance at risk. For the price of a convenience-store coffee, ignite Pro: global ladder, silent cloud backup, and full DYNO INTEL rigidity.
body.quota-exhausted: ⚠️ [UPLINK CAP REACHED]: Today's 2 single-axis briefings are spent. Your {{axis}} axis still idles at {{score}} pts — cross-axis diagnostics and 30 daily uplinks are Pro-only. Ignite Pro to restore full chassis telemetry.

paywall.billingFail: Billing link failed — try again or restore purchases in Settings.

error.network: Telemetry link lost — try again shortly.
error.weightProfileMissing: Complete your body profile on Home before running weight simulation.
error.quotaExhaustedPro: Daily uplink cap reached (30/day) — return after reset.
